title: Brute Force Algorithm Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the systematic, exhaustive process of a brute force approach to problem-solving, highlighting its key components and trade-offs.
relationships: Process starts with Problem Input, which flows to Generate All Possible Candidates, which connects to Test Candidate for Solution. If test passes, flow goes to Solution Found. If test fails, flow loops back to generate next candidate. If all candidates are exhausted, flow goes to No Solution.
